name: cato-ficc-mcp
description: Read-only MCP server for FICC market data — NY Fed, FRED, TreasuryDirect, OFR, SEC EDGAR. Advisory use only; no tool routes or settles a trade. v0.3.0 adds the XRPL settlement rail (live fee state via public JSON-RPC, deterministic-finality routing preference); v0.2.3 added sticky CoinGecko price cache; v0.2.2 restored the SOFR 1-day delta funding-shock detector validated against the September 2019 repo spike.
author: Guillermo (Bill) Ravelo
